## Qualia Stem Cell - Supplement Facts & Ingredients

Serving Size: 2 Vegetarian Capsules [...] ### Astragalus root extract

Astragalus membranaceus, or Huang Qi, is a perennial herb native to northeast Asia, flourishing in dry, sandy soils and regions such as mountain thickets and vast grasslands. In Traditional Chinese Medicine it is one of the most important herbs for tonifying Qi and enhancing vitality, and is also renowned for healing and promoting healthy blood circulation. Preclinical studies suggest that Astragalus root aids healing by promoting healthy stem cell proliferation and differentiation.\

### Salvia miltiorrhiza extract [...] Sodium copper chlorophyllin Sodium copper chlorophyllin is derived from chlorophyll, the vibrant green pigment found in plants and algae that plays a crucial role in photosynthesis. In preclinical studies, this compound helps protect stem cells against oxidative stress and supports healthy stem cell proliferation and differentiation.\

L-Serine L-Serine is an amino acid essential for protein synthesis and plays a vital role in stem cell function and maintenance. It is also required for nucleotide synthesis - the basic building blocks of DNA and RNA - which supports stem cell division, proliferation, and growth.\ [...] | Astragalus (Astragalus membranaceus) Root Extract 100 mg | \\ |
| Bromelain 100 mg | \\ |
| Sodium Copper Chlorophyllin 50 mg | \\ |
| CyaninPlus® Spirulina Extract 40 mg | \\ |
